conclusion: Broader first-order-curvature Shiab scope does not change any project-level conclusion relative to identity-shiab. Both paths produce the same qualitative pattern: mixed branch boundary, growing residuals under nontrivial direct refinement (negative convergence evidence), and zero-invariant control ladders. The paired path residuals are of similar magnitude but slightly different scaling; gauge violations grow less steeply on the paired path. Neither path demonstrates continuum limit convergence for nontrivial solutions.
